texto: The culture and heritage should stay intact and be maintained as it provides the individuals with some degree of resiliency. The effects of the trauma is what should be focused on and treated. Improving the quality of life for survivors is the focus of treatment. It is not to erase the past.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Thomas Hodge sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “The culture and heritage should stay intact and be maintained as it provides the individuals with…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a superacao, trauma, traumatic-experiences, útil em momentos de traumatic-experiences e traumatized.
